headlines.text: Drone strikes UAE nuclear plant as Iran war enters Day 79 with no peace deal in sight
Bulgaria's Dara wins Eurovision 2026 with 'Bangaranga' in Vienna — biggest margin in contest history
Napoleon Solo pulls off 10-1 upset to win 151st Preakness Stakes at Laurel Park
SNL Season 51 finale: Will Ferrell plays Epstein's ghost haunting Trump; Paul McCartney closes the season
IDF kills Hamas Gaza military chief Izzadin El Haddad in precision airstrike
Sen. Bill Cassidy loses Louisiana GOP primary to Trump-backed Julia Letlow
Israel and US reportedly preparing to renew Iran strikes as peace talks collapse
Gas prices hit $4.52 national average — up 53% since war started in February
Stocks slide Friday as Dow falls 537 pts; oil tops $109/bbl on Hormuz fears
Alex Cooper of 'Call Her Daddy' announces pregnancy with husband Matt Kaplan

breaking.text: Drone strikes electrical generator at UAE Barakah Nuclear Plant; no radiation leak reported

stories.hed: Drone hits UAE nuclear plant; Israel and US prep for renewed Iran strikes as talks collapse
stories.dek: A drone struck an electrical generator at the UAE Barakah Nuclear Power Plant today, because apparently the region was not spicy enough. Israel says it has hit 100 sites in Lebanon in two days despite a ceasefire — a word that has apparently lost all meaning.

stories.hed: Bulgaria's Dara wins Eurovision 2026 in Vienna with record-shattering 516 points
stories.dek: Dara and her club banger 'Bangaranga' swept both the jury and televote at the 70th Eurovision Song Contest — Bulgaria's first-ever win. Five countries boycotted over Israel's participation, ensuring no one could just enjoy the sparkly costumes in peace.

stories.hed: Sen. Bill Cassidy loses Louisiana Senate primary to Trump-backed Rep. Julia Letlow
stories.dek: Cassidy, one of seven GOP senators who voted to convict Trump after January 6, has now paid the price at the ballot box. The result cements Trump's grip on the Republican Party and his willingness to carry grudges across multiple election cycles.

stories.hed: Iran suspected in hack of US gas station fuel-level monitoring systems
stories.dek: US officials suspect Iran hacked systems that display fuel levels at gas stations across several states, changing the displays but not the actual fuel. It is unclear whether this was sabotage or Iran simply trolling Americans who are already mad about $4.52 gas.

stories.hed: Trump is trapped by his own Iran war strategy and nobody knows how it ends
stories.dek: CNN reports Trump is 'trapped by his own strategy' as he grapples for an exit from a war with no clear endgame, stalled peace talks, $109 oil, and a Strait of Hormuz that has been closed for 79 days. Even the guy who wrote 'The Art of the Deal' cannot deal his way out of this one.

markets.context: Stocks fell sharply Friday as Iran peace talks collapsed after the Trump-Xi summit, sending oil above $109/bbl and Treasury yields to one-year highs, triggering a broad tech selloff.

gas.note: At $4.52 a gallon, filling up a tank now costs roughly the same as your first month of therapy — which you will need.

popCulture.hed: Will Ferrell plays Epstein's ghost haunting Trump in SNL Season 51 finale, with Paul McCartney closing the show
popCulture.dek: SNL ended its 51st season with Will Ferrell as a chain-rattling Epstein apparition visiting a napping Trump fresh off his China trip — they sang 'Just the Two of Us' together, which is a sentence that exists now. Paul McCartney then closed the whole thing out with an encore, because nothing follows a Epstein sketch like a Beatle.

genZ.definition: Following Bulgaria's shock Eurovision 2026 win with Dara's 'Bangaranga,' TikTok lit up overnight with users recreating the song's intense choreography and posting their own versions. The song's chaotic club-banger energy and the phrase 'Welcome to the riot!' became instant meme fodder across every platform.
genZ.usage: When the Dow drops 537 points but you still have to act fine at brunch: *Bangaranga dance commences*

tldr: Day 79 of the Iran war brought a drone strike on a UAE nuclear plant and collapsing peace talks, while oil stayed above $109 a barrel and stocks sold off hard. On the lighter side, Bulgaria shocked Eurovision, Napoleon Solo shocked the Preakness, and Will Ferrell shocked SNL viewers by playing Jeffrey Epstein's ghost — so truly something for everyone.
